description.p: Silkborn are a spider-like species native to Nerukhet, typically emerging from silken cocoons amidst thick webbing that fills miles of tunnels throughout the subterranean province. They have a deep kinship and connection with the bejeweled arachnids and insects that have assisted them in building the grandest civilization in Druskenvald. This folk also channels the great gems that fill the caverns of the province with light and power, bringing them ever closer to the gods that spared their kind from an ancient calamity.

While this species has humanoid proportions, they have arachnid features—hardened carapace skin, numerous eyes, segmented limbs that grow from their backs, and mandibles that sprout from their mouths. They generally live for 250 years, but those at the higher echelons of their civilizations have been known to live nearly 800 years.
You have the following racial traits.
Creature Type. You are a Humanoid.
Size. You are Medium (about 5-6 feet tall).
Speed. Your walking speed is 30 feet, and you have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

Bejewled Carapace. When you are hit with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to add your proficiency bonus to your AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. Once you use this trait, you can’t do so again until you finish a short or long rest.
Darkvision. You have darkvision out to a range of 60 feet.

Silken Legacy. You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) using this trait, and starting at 5th level, you can cast the Web spell using this trait, both without material components. Once you cast Find Familiar or Web with this trait, you can’t cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast either spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.
Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select this species).
Spider Climb. You can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing an ability check and while leaving your hands free.

When you are hit with an attack roll, you can use your reaction to add your proficiency bonus to your AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. Once you use this trait, you can’t do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

sheet.description: When you are hit with an attack roll, you can add your proficiency bonus to your AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss.

description.p: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) using this trait, and starting at 5th level, you can cast the Web spell using this trait, both without material components. Once you cast Find Familiar or Web with this trait, you can’t cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast either spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.
Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select this species).
Your spellcasting ability for this feature’s spells is Intelligence.

sheet.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) and the Web spell once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

description.p: Your spellcasting ability for this feature’s spells is Wisdom.

sheet.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) and the Web spell once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

description.p: Your spellcasting ability for this feature’s spells is Charisma.

sheet.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. You can cast the Find Familiar spell (the familiar takes the form of a jeweled insect or arachnid) and the Web spell once per long rest without using a spell slot or material components. You can also cast this spell using a spell slot. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

description.p: You can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing an ability check and while leaving your hands free.

sheet.description: You can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing an ability check and while leaving your hands free.
